description: In-flight, a warning light indicates an issue with the cabin pressurization system. The flight crew must take immediate action.

nodes.task_description: The crew follows the emergency checklist for a pressurization failure.

expected_outcome.expected: Pilots follow the correct emergency procedure.

nodes.task_description: If the cabin altitude continues to climb, the passenger oxygen masks will deploy automatically. The crew initiates an emergency descent to a safe altitude (typically 10,000 feet).
The pilot declares an emergency with ATC and diverts to the nearest suitable airport.

expected_outcome.expected: The flight is safely diverted to resolve the technical issue.
